name: Vegetable Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup frozen corn kernels, thawed and drained
1/4 cup very finely chopped sweet red pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly coat a 9-inch glass pie plate with nonstick vegetable cooking spray.
3. Add broccoli, corn, red pepper, and chives to the pie plate; gently toss to mix.
4. Combine cottage cheese, yogurt, egg, egg white, Parmesan cheese, flour, olive oil, baking powder, and salt in an electric blender.
5. Whirl until smooth, scraping down sides as necessary.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the vegetables in the pie plate.
7. Gently mix and smooth the top with a spatula.
8. Bake in the preheated 350-degree oven for 30-40 minutes until brown around the edge and set in the center.
9. Remove from the wire rack to cool for 15 minutes before slicing.
10. Serve warm.
